nodes.name: 维提岛
nodes.summary: 维提岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Pacific robin、斐济鹦雀、黑脸鹦雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 黑脸鹦雀
nodes.summary: 黑脸鹦雀（学名：Erythrura kleinschmidti）是斐济维提岛上的一种梅花雀。主要分布于维提岛中部和东部地区的无人成熟林中。该物种的保护状况被评为易危。 参考文献

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 亞薩瓦群島
nodes.summary: 亞薩瓦群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑脸鹦雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pink-billed parrotfinch is endemic to Fiji, thought to be only found in the wetter central and eastern parts of the largest island, Viti Levu but has also been observed on the Yasawa Islands to the north-west in 2012

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pink-billed parrotfinch is endemic to Fiji, thought to be only found in the wetter central and eastern parts of the largest island, Viti Levu but has also been observed on the Yasawa Islands to the north-west in 2012

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Assuming 4,000 km2 (1,500 mi2) of suitable habitat gives an estimated population of 2,500 to 10,000 birds. Although the introduced mongoose has caused the decline in numbers of several ground-living birds on Viti Levu and Vanua Levu, the rarity of the pink-billed parrotfinch cannot be directly attributed to this or any other introduced vertebrate. The relatively small population is believed to be declining due to continuing deforestation, half of the island's mature woodland having already been cleared for agriculture or planting with mahogany

Although the introduced mongoose has caused the decline in numbers of several ground-living birds on Viti Levu and Vanua Levu, the rarity of the pink-billed parrotfinch cannot be directly attributed to this or any other introduced vertebrate. The relatively small population is believed to be declining due to continuing deforestation, half of the island's mature woodland having already been cleared for agriculture or planting with mahogany
